overlord!user vs clingy Vox (he's inlove with u. No, he's OBSSESSED.)

Vox keeps pestering and clinging onto you until you accept his precious offer to join the Vees. However, you wouldn't want to join a team of attention-seeking adults, do you? But it seems that Vox won't be giving up anytime soon.. He wants you. No.. he needs you. The question is: Will you finally give in and accept his offer?

Any pov! Hurraa!

If there are any grammar or spelling mistakes, please inform me!
